title: Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{ComicSeries |image=[[File:CSW_TEA_1_cover_art.png]] |title=''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' |writer= |penciller= |inker= |letterer= |colorist= |cover artist= |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |start date=[[August 9]], [[1994]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53780/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_1|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #1}} |end date=[[April 11]], [[1995]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53788/classic_star_wars_the_early_adventures_1994_9|text=Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures (1994) #9}} |schedule= |format= |issues=9 |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures''''' is a comic series that is part of the ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' series of comics and re-publishes [[Russ Manning]]'s [[Star Wars (comic strip)|''Star Wars'' black-and-white newspaper strips]] which originally ran in [[1979]] and [[1980]]. The artwork has been colored, reformatted, and retouched by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. The series is composed of 9 issues released between August [[1994]] and April [[1995]], and compiled in a trade paperback in May [[1997]]. ==Contents== *"[[Gambler's World]]" *"[[Tatooine Sojourn]]" *"[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]" *"[[The Second Kessel Run]]" *"[[Bring Me the Children]]" *"[[As Long As We Live...]]" *"[[The Frozen World of Ota]]" ==Media== ===Issues=== {| {{Prettytable}} ! colspan="3" |Color code key: |- |style="background-color:#FFBB60;" align="center" width="33%" |Collected (TPB) issue |style="background-color:#40CC40;" align="center" width="33%" |Released issue |style="background-color:#FFFF80;" align="center" width="33%" |Future issue |} {| {{Prettytable}} !
